description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright and facing forward. He wears a sleeveless, high-collared athletic top with angular shoulder accents and fitted pants, both featuring geometric paneling and subtle color blocking. His hands are gloved, and he sports a prominent face mask covering the lower half of his face, suggesting a modern or urban streetwear influence. The footwear is chunky and athletic, with layered soles and strap details, complementing the overall sporty aesthetic. His hair is styled in a tall, spiked mohawk, adding a distinctive and edgy flair. The figure's accessories and attire suggest a contemporary, active urban lifestyle.
description: A muscular adult male in modern athletic streetwear, with a face mask, gloves, and a spiked mohawk hairstyle. The figure exudes a sporty, urban vibe with fitted clothing and chunky footwear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, face mask, gloves, and mohawk hairstyle clearly, with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face mask, the angular cut of the top, and the layered footwear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the sleeveless top, the mohawk from behind, and the fitted pants with visible paneling.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, glove details, and the athletic shoe design.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless athletic top, fitted pants, gloves, face mask, and athletic footwear
